corrections.question: For positive integer values of n, identify all of the following four expressions for the nth term of a sequence that result in a geometric sequence: 1) n; 2) n²; 3) The nth power of –3; 4) 2 to the nth power.

corrections.notes: Trailing PDF page-footer removed: '2016 NSB® Regional High School Questions Page 10'

Question about sides of a right triangle with lengths m, m+n, and m+n. Math symbols in the equation are garbled in the parsed text. Needs visual inspection of the original PDF to determine correct equation and provide fix.
